heading: Qaab-dhismeedka Kharashka
askAiPrompt: Qaab-dhismeedka kharashkaygu: qiimaha alaabta waa {cogsPct}% dakhliga ({cogsAmt}), kharashyada joogtada ah waa {fixedPct}% ({fixedAmt}). Waa maxay saddexda meelood ee ugu weyn ee aan kharashka ka dhimi karo iyada oo aan kobaca la dhaawicin?
costsExceed: Kharashku wuxuu ka badan yahay dakhliga {sym}{n} halkii {sym}100 la kasbado
